case_title: SHUVONDA WRIGHT VS. THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIAITON FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EM

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, SHUVONDA AS TO DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIAITON FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EM PLOYMENT AND DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, SHUVONDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIAITON FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EM PLOYMENT AND DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE $2,493.57 PRINCIPAL, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,608.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
